mapper.select: SELECT id, metric_code, entity_code, attribute_code, role_type, description, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_metric_attribute WHERE metric_code = #{metricCode} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT id, metric_code, entity_code, attribute_code, role_type, description, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_metric_attribute WHERE is_deleted = false AND metric_code IN #{code}
